Automate deployment, configuration, and upgrading

https://www.ansible.com/

License: GPL-3.0-or-later

Development: Pull requests

Formula JSON API: /api/formula/ansible@10.json

sequoia ✅
sonoma ✅

Intel		 sonoma ✅

stable ✅ 10.7.0

ansible@13 13.8.0 Automate deployment, configuration, and upgrading

Revision: 6

Keg-only

Depends on:

certifi 2026.6.17 Mozilla CA bundle for Python
libsodium 1.0.22 NaCl networking and cryptography library
libssh 0.12.0 C library SSHv1/SSHv2 client and server protocols
libyaml 0.2.5 YAML Parser
openssl@3 3.6.2 Cryptography and SSL/TLS Toolkit
python@3.12 3.12.13 Interpreted, interactive, object-oriented programming language

Depends on when building from source:

pkgconf 2.5.1 Package compiler and linker metadata toolkit
rust 1.96.0 Safe, concurrent, practical language
